executive_summary.verdict: DIS is trading 19% below Lynch Fair Value! Streaming losses narrowing, parks thriving.
executive_summary.key_insight: Lynch $120 vs Price $100 = 20% upside. Parks + content moat is undervalued.

graham.recommendation: Graham not applicable - goodwill from Fox, Pixar, Marvel, Lucasfilm

5Y.analysis: Lynch crashed from $200 to $120 as streaming burned cash

dcf.recommendation: Near DCF fair value - not cheap but not expensive

business_segments.parks: Theme parks thriving - highest margin segment
business_segments.streaming: Disney+ losses narrowing, path to profitability
business_segments.content: Marvel, Star Wars, Pixar, Disney Animation

risk_factors.content_costs: Expensive to produce Marvel/Star Wars content

bull_case.thesis: Streaming turns profitable. Parks keep growing. Content moat unmatched.

bear_case.thesis: Streaming never profitable. Content fatigue. Recession hits parks.
